name: emthao-jp-search
description: EmThaoJP Search — one-command runner for the backend + frontend workspaces.

scripts.setup: npm install --prefix backend && npx --prefix backend playwright install chromium && npm install --prefix frontend && node -e "const fs=require('fs');for(const d of ['backend','frontend']){const e=`${d}/.env`,x=`${d}/.env.example`;if(!fs.existsSync(e)&&fs.existsSync(x)){fs.copyFileSync(x,e);console.log('created',e);}}"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names BACK,FRONT --prefix-colors green,cyan "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
